logger.doc:name: Log Payment Not Ready
logger.message: Payment not ready for fulfillment | OrderId: #[vars.orderId] | PaymentStatus: #[vars.paymentStatus.status]

raise-error.description: #['Payment status is ' ++ (vars.paymentStatus.status default 'UNKNOWN') ++ '. Payment must be CAPTURED or AUTHORIZED before fulfillment.']

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId, warehouseId: vars.fulfillmentRequest.warehouseId default "WH-PRIMARY", priority: vars.fulfillmentRequest.priority default "NORMAL", pickingInstructions: { method: vars.fulfillmentRequest.shippingMethod default "STANDARD", specialInstructions: vars.fulfillmentRequest.specialInstructions default "", requestedShipDate: vars.fulfillmentRequest.requestedShipDate default ((now() + |P1D|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}) }, initiatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: correlationId }

logger.doc:name: Log Picking Initiated
logger.message: Warehouse picking initiated | PickingId: #[vars.pickingResponse.pickingId default 'N/A'] | OrderId: #[vars.orderId]

logger.doc:name: Log SAP Status Update
logger.message: Updating order status to FULFILLING in SAP | OrderId: #[vars.orderId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "FULFILLING", fulfillmentDetails: { pickingId: vars.pickingResponse.pickingId default "", warehouseId: vars.fulfillmentRequest.warehouseId default "WH-PRIMARY", shippingMethod: vars.fulfillmentRequest.shippingMethod default "STANDARD", estimatedShipDate: vars.pickingResponse.estimatedShipDate default ((now() + |P1D|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}), estimatedDeliveryDate: vars.pickingResponse.estimatedDeliveryDate default ((now() + |P5D|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}) }, updatedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, updatedBy: "order-orchestration-papi" }

logger.doc:name: Log Salesforce Update
logger.message: Updating opportunity in Salesforce for order: #[vars.orderId]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId, stage: "Closed Won - Fulfilling", fulfillmentStatus: "IN_PROGRESS", fulfillmentInitiatedDate: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}, pickingId: vars.pickingResponse.pickingId default "", lastModifiedBy: "order-orchestration-papi", lastModifiedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { eventType: "order-fulfilled", eventId: uuid(), timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"}, correlationId: correlationId, data: { orderId: vars.orderId, customerId: vars.fulfillmentRequest.customerId default "", pickingId: vars.pickingResponse.pickingId default "", warehouseId: vars.fulfillmentRequest.warehouseId default "WH-PRIMARY", shippingMethod: vars.fulfillmentRequest.shippingMethod default "STANDARD", status: "FULFILLING", estimatedDeliveryDate: vars.pickingResponse.estimatedDeliveryDate default ((now() + |P5D|) as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}) } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, errorCode: "PAYMENT_NOT_READY", message: error.description, orderId: vars.orderId, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"} }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, errorCode: "FULFILLMENT_FAILED", message: "Order fulfillment failed. Please contact support.", detail: error.description default "Unknown fulfillment error", orderId: vars.orderId, correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"} }
